title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Roger, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Whitebeard Pirates, Unknown person #4 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After Roger returned from laugh tale, Redtaro...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The treasure he left behind...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Asked him several questions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: and then began to cry...

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: with the birth of the "pirate King",

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The whole world was in an uproar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The Navy immediately took action...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "Wealth," "Fame," "power." the man who obtained everything,

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: "Pirate King" gold Roger!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's GOL D. Roger!!...but "pirate King" isn't bad at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems that's what the world government is calling you now.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If they're hiding your name like that, they must know its true meaning....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world started referring to what Roger had obtained as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They have no idea!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uahaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: But thanks to that title,

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: The whole world is after us, Roger...

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Guys! Let's kill Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: Locate Roger, now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That treasure is all ours!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: We'll take everything gold Roger has!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Looking back, it's a total miracle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't have much time left, yet we came this far!! It's all thanks to you guys!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's this all about? Don't be so formal, idiot Captain!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're making us blush! You bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Scum!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Well, say it already!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard Pirates
dialogue.text: C'mon, Captain!! We can take it!!

dialogue.speaker: Roger
dialogue.text: The Roger Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: are hereby disbanded!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Guwaaaa--!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gobobo..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: They'll be born...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Our kings are soon to be born...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Looks like one will come from a far away sea...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure the whales will be happy too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've been waiting for so long...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Now it's just a little longer....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: This time, things will surely work out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if it takes ten years until they're born...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they take another fifteen to grow strong...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who's there?! Where's that voice coming from?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey shyarly, maybe you could tell us when position will be born?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: 10 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: those voices...they must be telling the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Someone will be born that is going to surpass even us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We... were too early.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Who do you think will find it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Why, my son obviously!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where are you going to find a son?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I can always make one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Uahaha Hahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Alright, men! Let's drink!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and head to a sea with no marine in sight!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be the first to get off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After that, take open back to Wano Kuni!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 56 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
